Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('sum', json_build_object('budget', SUM("budget"), 'kind', 'departments_sum_fields'), 'max', json_build_object('budget', MAX("budget"), 'kind', 'departments_max_fields')) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate"
